assertions.description: Imports and calls dfsFromNode from graphology-traversal
Calls betweennessCentrality.assign(graph) to write scores onto nodes
Iterates nodes to find the node with the highest betweenness score
assertions.evidence: graph.forEachNode((node, attrs) => { if (score > topScore) { topScore = score; topNode = node; } })

assertions.description: Finds directed path from app to scheduler

assertions.evidence: graph.mergeNode(pkg) — idiomatic mergeNode used for all 7 packages

qualitative_notes: Uses mergeNode/mergeEdge (idempotent) over addNode — explicit comment explains why. Comment on .assign() pattern explains the rendering pipeline idiom.
